qa_pairs.question: After launching a Trillium Desktop job in Open OnDemand, what steps should a user take to connect to the desktop environment and optimize its performance?
qa_pairs.answer: After launching a Trillium Desktop job, users will be taken to the 'My Interactive Sessions' page. Once the job is running, they can optimize performance by adjusting the 'Image Quality' and 'Image Compression' settings, especially if their internet connection is slow. Finally, to connect to the remote desktop environment, they should click the 'Connect to Trillium Desktop' button.

qa_pairs.question: How can users improve the performance and responsiveness of a Trillium Desktop session in Open OnDemand based on their internet connection speed?
qa_pairs.answer: To improve the performance and responsiveness of a Trillium Desktop session in Open OnDemand, users can adjust the 'Image Quality' and 'Image Compression' settings. If they have a slow internet connection, setting these options lower is recommended to enhance desktop performance.
